titleStmt.title: SII 34.149: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 149. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: The king ordered, on Toṇḍaimāṉ's petition, assignment of some tax-free dēvadāna land in Edirilichōḻa-nallūr to those bringing the Kaveri water for sacred ablution in the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalai-Mādēva in Kurunagar-nāḍu in Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu. The royal secretary Mīṉavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ wrote the order. It is said that the said land had been given sometime back to the temple but it was without anybody's enjoyment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti kOṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ rācakempīra vaḷanāṭṭu kuṟunakar nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiru
māṇikkamalaimātēvar kōyil tēvarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum I
ttēvarkku kāvēri tirumañcaṇam cumappārkku nivantatukkuṭalāka Iṉṉāṭṭu Etirili cōḻa nallūril tēvatāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyākamuṉpu Iṭṭu Aṉupōkamiṉṟiyē varukiṟa nilam naṉcey puṉcey Uḷppaṭa pottakappaṭi nilam nūṟṟu mu
ppattu reṇṭēy mukkālu maṭṭiyē tēvatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Ittirumañcaṉam vaipparukku nivantatukkuṭalā
viṭakkaṭavatāka peṟa vēṇum Eṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac colli kaṇa
kkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉōm Iṉṉilam Irupa
vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal tēvatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka kaikkoṇṭu tirumañcaṇam Eṭuppārkku nivantatuk
kuṭalāka koḷḷappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Ōlai mīṉavaṉ mūvēnta vēḷāṉ Ivai
varāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāṅkēyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai mūvēntarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai varakuṇaṟāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
